objects.query: SELECT DeveloperName, MasterLabel, ApplicationUsageType FROM ApplicationSubtypeDefinition WHERE DeveloperName = 'SolverPath'
SELECT DeveloperName, MasterLabel, ApplicationUsageType FROM BusinessProcessTypeDef WHERE DeveloperName = 'SolverPath'

SELECT DeveloperName, MasterLabel, ApplicationType, ApplicationSubtype.DeveloperName, ProcessType.DeveloperName, ActionLogSchemaType, IsInternal, Description FROM ExplainabilityActionDef WHERE DeveloperName = 'SolverPath'
SELECT DeveloperName, MasterLabel, ExplainabilityActionDef.DeveloperName, IsActive, Description, DefinitionVersion FROM ExplainabilityActionVersion WHERE DeveloperName = 'SolverPath'
